summary: 0.6.62 is a presentation-only plugin UI slice: consolidate the visible player info into one multiline summary, remove the noisy visible CUA status row, and keep playback, demo3, and runtime transport untouched.
operatorSignals: Video and image behavior were already solid, and sync was the best it had been yet.
The operator wanted one useful text area instead of scattered or noisy output.
The operator wanted concise lines for playback status, loop, shuffle, media, format, progress, total, remaining, folder, and file.
actionsTaken: Added one multiline player summary field to the plugin UI.
Removed the visible CUA status text row from the plugin panel while keeping its transient plumbing intact.
Left demo3 readback, player sliders, and playback transport untouched.
nonGoals: No transport, sync, shuffle, slideshow, volume, or gaze changes in this slice.
No demo3 text-binding changes in this slice.
